hero.sub: Tacit is where generous, successful people meet ambitious, attractive ones — video-verified profiles, discreet by design, free to join.
fork.baby.title: I'm a Sugar Baby
fork.baby.body: Be courted by generous, successful people who value your time and ambition. Free — always.
fork.benefactor.title: I'm a Sugar Daddy
fork.benefactor.body: Meet attractive, ambitious partners — video-verified profiles, every detail discreet.
how.title: How Tacit works
how.step1.title: Create your profile
how.step1.body: Photos, a little about you, and what you're looking for. Say it once, honestly.
how.step2.title: Match and talk
how.step2.body: Browse members near you and open the conversations that interest you.
how.step3.title: Meet
how.step3.body: First dates in public, on your terms. The understanding takes care of itself.
why.title: Dating on your terms
why.verified.title: Video-verified profiles
why.verified.body: Look for the verification badge — a video selfie check that proves a member is who their photos say. No bots, no catfish, no guessing.
why.noapp.title: No app to explain
why.noapp.body: Tacit runs in your browser. Nothing on your home screen, nothing in an app store, nothing to delete in a hurry.
why.credits.title: Pay as you go
why.credits.body: Credits, not subscriptions. Top up when you choose — no auto-renewals, no surprises.
why.albums.title: Private albums
why.albums.body: Your photos, your call. Keep some for everyone and some for the few you choose.
daddy.def: A Sugar Daddy is a successful, generous person who knows what they want — and enjoys sharing a remarkable lifestyle with a partner who appreciates it.
daddy.benefits.title: On Tacit, you can expect
daddy.benefit1: Attention that's earned, not performed — from verified members who chose this.
daddy.benefit2: Dating that respects your time, your privacy, and your standards.
daddy.benefit3: A partner for dinners, trips, and the events you'd rather not attend alone.
baby.def: A Sugar Baby is ambitious, independent, and honest about wanting more from dating — experiences, mentorship, and the company of someone established.
baby.benefits.title: On Tacit, you can expect
baby.benefit1: Generous, successful people who never make you guess where you stand.
baby.benefit2: Video verification and private albums that keep you in control of who sees what.
baby.benefit3: Free membership for Sugar Babies — always.
final.reassure: Free to join · Video-verified · No app required
footer.adults: Strictly 18+. Tacit is a dating platform for consenting adults.
footer.geonames: Place data from GeoNames, licensed CC BY 4.0.
